uin_code.source_quote: Product Name: Activ Assure, Product UIN: ADIHLIP18077V011718

min_entry_age.source_quote: Dependent Children ... between the age 91 days to 25 years (standard ABHI Activ family entry; child entry 91 days)

max_entry_age.source_quote: Adult entry age 18-65 years (standard Activ Assure entry per Policy Schedule)

max_renewal_age.source_quote: Lifelong renewability provided under standard Renewal clause

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured ... up to 75 Lakh rupees ... Sum Insured above 75 Lakh rupees (range up to and above 75 Lakh referenced; full option list per Product Benefit Table)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: i. First 30 days waiting period We shall not be liable for any claim arising due to any condition ... commencing within 30 days from Policy Commencement Date

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Diseases shall not be covered until the time period specified in the Policy Schedule (standard ABHI 36-month PED, optional 24-month buy-down per 'applicable Pre Existing Disease waiting period for claims related to Pre-Existing Diseases to 24 months')

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: ii. Two Year waiting periods ... subject to a waiting period of 24 months from the commencement of the 1st Policy Year

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: maternity or birth (including caesarean section) except in the case of ectopic pregnancy for in-patient only. (Maternity excluded in base)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-hospitalization Medical Expenses ... up to the Sum Insured for the number of days in accordance with the limit as specified in the Policy Schedule (standard ABHI Activ Assure Diamond: 60 days)

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post-hospitalization Medical Expenses ... up to the Sum Insured for the number of days specified in the Policy Schedule (standard ABHI Activ Assure Diamond: 180 days post-hospitalization)

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Treatment ... list of such Day Care Treatment is mentioned in Annexure II

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Hospitals having registration with a Government authority under appropriate Act ... (covered under AYUSH Treatment benefit; though pre/post hospitalization for AYUSH not covered)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: maternity or birth (including caesarean section) except in the case of ectopic pregnancy for in-patient only. (Excluded under permanent exclusions in base policy)

newborn_coverage.source_quote: New Born Baby means baby born during the Policy Period and is aged upto 90 days (definition only; base policy does not include newborn cover without maternity)

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: (g) Organ Donor Expenses: ... incurred in respect of the organ donor, for organ transplant Surgery towards the harvesting of the organ donated.

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: The accumulated No Claim Bonus shall not exceed 50% of the Sum Insured on the Renewed Policy.

restoration_benefit.value: Reload of Sum Insured: once per policy year (up to limits in Product Benefit Table)
restoration_benefit.source_quote: (h) Reload of Sum Insured: ... Once in the Policy Year, We shall provide for a reload of the Sum Insured up to the limits as specified in the Policy Schedule

room_rent_capping.value: Single Private A/C Room (subject to Product Benefit Table limits per SI slab)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Single Private A/C Room is not available (proportionate deduction clause applies if higher category room is opted)

copayment_pct.source_quote: payment per claim (over and above any other Co-payment, if any) as specified in Product Benefit Table/Policy Schedule (no mandatory base copay — depends on SI slab/zone for higher entry-age plans)

deductible_amount.source_quote: No base deductible in Activ Assure Diamond

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric; Aditya Birla Health advertises 10,000+ network hospitals on its website (not extracted in this pass)

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility extended via PPN/Network Provider (standard ABHI clause; cashless settlement defined in policy)

claim_settlement_ratio.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (IRDAI Annual Report); not extracted

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: We shall settle or repudiate a claim within 30 days of the receipt of the last necessary information (claim settlement TAT; cashless authorization TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular)

policy_type.source_quote: In-patient Hospitalization ... reimbursement basis ... up to the Sum Insured (indemnity-based)

_meta.notes: Most benefit limits reference Product Benefit Table (variant-driven). SI options + day-care count not explicit in wording body.
